accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and verified context: CFTC, the guidance title, the Oct. 15, 2024 Federal Register publication, and the CRA basis are correct.

no_hallucinations.why: The CRA reference and CFTC identification are accurate real-world context, not fabrications.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill nullifies the CFTC's voluntary carbon credit derivative guidance via congressional disapproval.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly identifies the CRA (chapter 8 of title 5) mechanism rendering the rule of no force or effect.

exceptions_conditions.why: The resolution contains no material exceptions or conditions, and the summary correctly notes this.

effective_dates.why: The resolution specifies no effective date beyond enactment, which the summary reasonably reflects.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the sole operative effect: disapproval of the guidance so it has no force or effect.

objective_tone.why: Neutral and descriptive with no advocacy or editorializing.

concise.why: Brief with only minor restatement of the disapproval effect.

correct_entities.why: CFTC, the Congressional Review Act, the guidance title, and the U.S. Code chapter are all correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: The October 15, 2024 Federal Register date is correct.
